name: iqueryable-persistence-projection
intent: Enable persistence as projection over queryable entities with schema-driven, backend-agnostic query comprehension. Phase 1 (complete): IQueryable interface, MongoDB-style operators, backend abstraction, SqlBackend compilation. Phase 2 (new): Database execution layer via Bun.sql, DDL execution integration, MCP database tools, and full isomorphic query execution.

indicators: Cross-cutting query capability used by all domain features
No external API calls - purely internal platform capability
Extends existing IPersistenceService with read-path abstraction
Environment DI pattern for dependency injection
Phase 2: Database execution via Bun.sql native driver
Phase 2: MCP tools for Claude database management
uncertainties: Resolved: Bun.sql chosen for execution layer
Connection pooling strategy for MCP server context
MST hydration merge strategy for query results
